message:
fix(done): add checkpoint-based resilience to gt done (gt-aufru)

Break the monolithic gt done operation into checkpointed stages so it
can resume after process interruption (SIGTERM, context exhaustion).

Checkpoints stored as labels on agent bead (done-cp:*):
- pushed: branch pushed to origin
- mr-created: MR bead created in merge queue
- dolt-merged: Dolt branch merged to main
- witness-notified: Witness notified of completion

On re-invocation, gt done reads existing checkpoints and skips
completed stages. Also adds SIGTERM handler for graceful cleanup
and --resume flag for explicit Witness recovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
